identity.name: SMILE Digital Twin Advisor
identity.description: An intelligent AI agent that queries the LPI MCP server to provide explainable answers about digital twin implementations using the SMILE methodology. Dynamically selects relevant tools based on question context and cites all sources.

tools.name: question_answering
tools.description: Answers user questions about digital twins, SMILE methodology, and implementation guidance by querying multiple LPI tools and synthesizing results with source citations.

tools.name: methodology_advisor
tools.description: Provides phase-specific SMILE implementation advice with step-by-step guidance, relevant case studies, and best practices.

tools.name: case_study_finder
tools.description: Finds and analyzes relevant digital twin implementation case studies across industries including healthcare, manufacturing, energy, and smart buildings.
